actionTitleEnabled.message: [B.M] YouTube media keys: On (click to turn off)

extDescription.message: Maps Play/Pause, Prev, Next to YouTube long video, Shorts, and Music. Toolbar toggle. Set Global at chrome://extensions/shortcuts.

optionsIntro.message: Click the toolbar icon to enable or disable media key capture; when disabled the icon shows a red “×”. Open this page or use the popup button for help and shortcuts.

optionsNavLi1.message: Shorts: previous/next short. Does not touch background Shorts while a long video tab is active.

optionsNavLi2.message: Long video (/watch, /live): Previous uses browser back (history.back()); Next sends Shift+N.

optionsNavLi3.message: YouTube Music: clicks the bar buttons, else Shift+N/P. On an unplayed playlist page, starts from the header or first row.

optionsNavP1.message: If the active tab is Shorts, watch/live, or YouTube Music, keys target that tab. Otherwise the last-used YouTube Music tab is preferred (audible first, then most recent). With no Music tab, nothing happens.

optionsPlayP1.message: Targets the active tab when it is watch/Shorts/Music; otherwise prefers the last YouTube Music tab, then other YouTube tabs by audible/recency.

optionsSetup2.message: Confirm all three commands under this extension are Global; no change if already correct.

optionsSetup3.message: If a shortcut is unset, click the field and press the media key to bind it.

optionsTrouble1.message: Disable other extensions that bind the same media keys.

optionsTrouble2.message: Update Chrome to the latest stable version.

optionsTrouble3.message: At chrome://flags, keep “Hardware Media Key Handling” enabled and restart.

optionsWarnRest.message: All three commands already set global: true in the manifest (intended as Global). Usually shortcuts already show Global; if any still say “In Chrome” or are unset, set them to Global and press the media key to bind.

optionsWarnStrong.message: Keys do nothing when Chrome is in the background:

popupHintDisabled.message: When off, play-pause, previous, and next are not handled by this extension.
